channel.title: Authors on Justin Doty
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Justin Doty

item.description: I am currently a PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Iowa. My research interests include econometrics, empirical industrial organization, and applied econometrics. In particular, I am interested in semi-parametric and non-parametric models with endogeneity and unobserved heterogeneity. I am interested in applying these econometric techniques to the literature on firm productivity heterogeneity.
